# Aabnoor Beaute

> Aabnoor Beaute is an ecommerce storefront for skincare, makeup, hair care, fragrance, live sale offers, secure checkout, order tracking, customer support, and product education.

## Primary Pages

- [Home and product catalog](https://aabnoor.shop/)
- [Live sale offers](https://aabnoor.shop/live-sale)
- [Track an order](https://aabnoor.shop/track)
- [Shipping and returns](https://aabnoor.shop/shipping)
- [Customer support](https://aabnoor.shop/contact)
- [Frequently asked questions](https://aabnoor.shop/faq)
- [Our story](https://aabnoor.shop/our-story)
- [Ingredients guide](https://aabnoor.shop/ingredients)
- [Sustainability](https://aabnoor.shop/sustainability)

## Product Discovery

Product pages include product name, category, price, availability, images, descriptions, ingredient guidance, usage notes, customer reviews, and structured Product schema where available.

## Order Support

Customers receive an order number and tracking number by email after checkout. Order tracking is available at https://aabnoor.shop/track.

## Contact

Customer support email: support@aabnoor.shop
